helpOutput:
Usage: opencli devto top [options]

Top DEV.to articles of the day

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of articles (default: "20")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: dev.to
Output columns: rank, title, author, reactions, comments, tags

payload.title: Announcing the Winners of the DEV Weekend Challenge: Earth Day Edition 🌍

payload.author: ainaomotayo

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli devto tag [options] <tag>

Latest DEV.to articles for a specific tag

Arguments:
  tag                 Tag name (e.g. javascript, python, webdev)

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of articles (default: "20")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: dev.to
Output columns: rank, title, author, reactions, comments, tags
